channel.title: 2026-01-22 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-01-22 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Predicting Complex Materials Energetics with a Scalable Compact Nine-Qubit Quantum Machine-Learning Model
item.description:
📚 PRX Energy
👤 Hsu-Kai Cheng, Po-Yu Yang, Jyh-Pin Chou, and Chun-Wei Pao
Author(s): Hsu-Kai Cheng, Po-Yu Yang, Jyh-Pin Chou, and Chun-Wei Pao A quantum machine learning method uses fewer than ten qubits to perform resource-efficient, scalable simulations of materials properties, with implications for quantum-assisted design of energy materials. [PRX Energy 5, 013004] Published Thu Jan 22, 2026
